description: Get Spotify tracks in true FLAC from Tidal, Qobuz & Amazon Music — no account required.
notes: Developer Mode is needed to create symlinks without admin rights
post_install: New-Item -ItemType SymbolicLink -Path "$HOME\.spotiflac\ffmpeg.exe" -Target (Get-Command ffmpeg | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source) -Force | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType SymbolicLink -Path "$HOME\.spotiflac\ffprobe.exe" -Target (Get-Command ffprobe | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source) -Force | Out-Null
